summary: Aligned README, skill, help text, and metadata with the current postman-explore implementation.
reason: The generated docs advertised unsupported sync flags and described drift as a two-snapshot diff even though the current command reports locally synced entities updated within a time window.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; go build ./cmd/postman-explore-pp-cli succeeded; --version reports 3.0.1; sync help shows Postman Explore resource examples.
